weather.headline: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
weather.tonight: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Light Rain Likely
